title: Mumbai Heat Wave
lead: Mumbai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.34. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mumbai has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, and the wind speed is 12.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, but the CDD is significantly high, leading to a critical level of heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
